name: Banana Oatmeal Cookies w/ Banana Frosting
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 20 Minutes Bake Time: 15 to 17 Minutes
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease baking sheet with Butter flavor Crisco.
2. In a large bowl, cream together Butter flavor Crisco and brown sugar until well blended. Beat in Egg. Add mashed bananas; mix until creamy.
3. Gradually stir in oats, flour, salt, cinnamon, baking soda, and nutmeg into the creamed mixture. Fold in chopped walnuts. Using a 2-tablespoon measuring scoop, drop dough onto the prepared baking sheet, spacing cookies about 2 inches apart.
4. Bake for 15 to 17 minutes or until golden brown. Let cool for 1 minute on the baking sheet before transferring to a cooling rack to cool completely.
5. For frosting: In a bowl, beat together Butter flavor Crisco, mashed bananas, and lemon juice. Gradually add confectioners' sugar; beat until smooth. Frost cooled cookies. Sprinkle with finely chopped walnuts if desired. Makes 5 dozen 2-inch cookies.
